title: athlete-enrollment — published events
description: Every event implements `ShouldDispatchAfterCommit`. Lifecycle events (submit / confirm / activate / complete / withdraw / expel) fan out to notifications + activity + audit. EnrollmentAtomicityFailed is a P1 event fired when the atomic conversion to TeamMember fails — every occurrence requires investigation.

events.name: EnrollmentSubmitted
events.trigger: AthleteEnrollmentProvisioner committed. Consumes 1 unit of athlete_enrollment_slot on the tenant's active per-season entitlement.

events.name: EnrollmentAgeGroupSnapshotSet
events.trigger: SnapshotAgeGroupOnEnrollmentSubmitted hook set the initial age_group_snapshot_id. Fires immediately after EnrollmentSubmitted.

events.name: EnrollmentAgeGroupSnapshotMismatched
events.trigger: The age_group_snapshot_matches_team_age_group rule fires as a SOFT-WARN — the snapshot doesn't match the team's declared age_group_id. Non-fatal, but flagged for admin review. Common cases: an under-age athlete playing up (allowed with note), an over-age athlete playing down (typically disallowed).

events.name: EnrollmentConfirmed
events.trigger: Status transitioned {submitted, payment_pending, consent_pending} → confirmed. All preconditions (payment + consent) met. Consent snapshot captured at this transition.

payload.consent_snapshot: object (from athlete's consent state at this moment)

events.name: EnrollmentActivated
events.trigger: Status transitioned confirmed → active. Season started + athlete is on the live roster. Fires alongside EnrollmentTeamMemberCreated in the same transaction.
consumers: notifications::DispatchEnrollmentActivatedNotification (to primary guardian + admin + coach + team members)

payload.team_member_id: ULID (trm_*) — created atomically in the same transaction

events.name: EnrollmentTeamMemberCreated
events.trigger: In the same transaction as EnrollmentActivated, the ConvertEnrollmentToTeamMemberAtomically hook created a teams::TeamMember row. Fires alongside teams::TeamMemberJoined so downstream consumers see both.

events.name: EnrollmentAtomicityFailed
events.trigger: P1 event. The ConvertEnrollmentToTeamMemberAtomically hook rolled back the DB transaction — either the enrollment update OR the TeamMember create failed. The enrollment stays in confirmed state; ActivateConfirmedEnrollmentsJob will retry on the next cycle. Every fire is a compliance-critical signal.

events.name: EnrollmentCompleted
events.trigger: Status transitioned active → completed. Terminal happy path. Season ended — athlete completed the enrollment. Also fires via season::SeasonCompleted cascade.

events.name: EnrollmentWithdrawn
events.trigger: Status transitioned active/confirmed → withdrawn. Terminal (parent-initiated exit). Cascades: soft-deletes the linked TeamMember.

events.name: EnrollmentExpelled
events.trigger: Status transitioned active → expelled. Terminal (disciplinary termination). Audit-critical.

events.name: EnrollmentExpired
events.trigger: ExpireExpiredProvisionalEnrollmentsJob detected an enrollment past registration_closes_at + expiry_ttl_days without reaching confirmed. Fires per expired enrollment. Releases 1 unit of athlete_enrollment_slot.

events.name: EnrollmentWaitlisted
events.trigger: Status transitioned submitted → waitlisted. Team at capacity at submit time; waitlist workflow enabled. Fires with waitlist_position (queue rank).

events.name: EnrollmentPromotedFromWaitlist
events.trigger: PromoteWaitlistedEnrollmentsJob picked the earliest-waitlisted enrollment when team capacity opened. Status transitions waitlisted → submitted (or directly to confirmed if all other preconditions already met).

events.name: EnrollmentCapacityExceeded
events.trigger: Recoverable event. Fires when an enrollment is submitted for a team at capacity + waitlist entitlement is on — the observer moves the enrollment to waitlisted. When waitlist entitlement is off (Small tier), the observer refuses the submit with TEAM_AT_CAPACITY error and this event doesn't fire.

events.name: EnrollmentProvisionalCreated
events.trigger: Enterprise-only. Enrollment created with enrollment_type='provisional' — pending guardian consent past the deadline. The enrollment consumes a slot + holds the roster position while consent is chased.

events.name: EnrollmentConsentReceived
events.trigger: Consent snapshot updated from a prior state where required consents were missing to a state where they're recorded. Distinct from athlete::AthleteConsentRecorded because the enrollment observes it in its own context.
consumers: notifications::DispatchConsentReceivedNotification (to admin — enrollment can now transition to confirmed)

events.name: EnrollmentConsentSnapshotUpdated
events.trigger: consent_snapshot JSONB mutated on an existing enrollment (rare — usually consent_snapshot is captured at confirm-time + never touched again unless the parent athlete's consent state materially changes).

events.name: EnrollmentPaymentStatusChanged
events.trigger: payment_status mutated. Wave 4 Finance module fires this — currently a placeholder for the payment_status transitions (none → pending → paid).

events.name: EnrollmentPositionAssigned
events.trigger: position_assigned mutated (coach assigns a position). Fires once per assignment.

events.name: EnrollmentJerseyAssigned
events.trigger: jersey_number_assigned mutated. Enforced unique per team via partial unique index.
